title: Costa Blanca Property Prices Rise by 5% in Q1 2024
content: The property market in Costa Blanca continues to show remarkable resilience and growth. Recent data from the first quarter of 2024 indicates a steady 5% increase in property values across the region, particularly in coastal areas. Investors are finding that the combination of lifestyle appeal and capital appreciation makes this one of Europe's most attractive markets. We expect this trend to continue as international demand remains high.
author: Anna Alizarenko

title: New High-Speed Train Link to Alicante Boosting Local Tourism
content: The expansion of the AVE high-speed rail network to include more frequent connections between Madrid and Alicante is already having a positive impact. Tourism numbers are projected to hit record highs this summer, which is driving up demand for short-term rental properties. Property owners in the city center are seeing a significant uptick in yields.
author: Elena Martinez

title: Top 5 Investment Locations in Spain for 2024
content: From the bustling streets of Alicante to the serene beaches of Javea, we've identified the top five locations where your money works hardest. Factors include rental yield, historical growth, and upcoming infrastructure projects. Costa Blanca dominates the list this year due to its balanced entry prices and high quality of life.
author: Anna Alizarenko

title: Alicante Ranked as One of the Best Cities for Remote Work
content: With its excellent connectivity, affordable cost of living, and over 300 days of sunshine, Alicante has been officially recognized as a top global destination for digital nomads. This shift is changing the local real estate landscape, with a higher demand for modern apartments featuring dedicated office spaces and high-speed fiber internet.
author: David Smith

title: New Coastal Development 'Marina Sands' Launched in Torrevieja
content: We are proud to announce the launch of Marina Sands, a luxury residential complex featuring 45 high-end apartments with direct sea access. This project represents the next generation of sustainable living on the coast, incorporating solar energy and greywater recycling systems.
author: Anna Alizarenko

title: How to Choose the Perfect Villa in Costa Blanca
content: Finding your dream home requires more than just a beautiful view. You need to consider orientation, proximity to services, and the legal status of the land. In this guide, we walk you through the essential checklist for buying a villa in Spain to ensure you make a sound investment.
author: Anna Alizarenko

title: Understanding Spanish Property Taxes: A Complete Guide
content: Taxes can be complex when buying abroad. From ITP to AJD and VAT, we break down exactly what you need to pay when buying, owning, and selling property in Spain. Knowing these costs upfront is crucial for budgeting your investment correctly.
author: Carlos Gomez

title: The Ultimate Guide to Moving to Spain in 2024
content: Thinking of making the big move? From residency visas and NIE numbers to healthcare and schools, this comprehensive guide covers everything you need to know about starting your new life on the sunny Mediterranean coast.
author: Anna Alizarenko

title: Why Foreign Investors are Flocking to Alicante
content: Alicante offers a unique blend of traditional Spanish charm and modern infrastructure. We analyze the market trends that are making international buyers choose Alicante over more expensive alternatives like Ibiza or Marbella.
author: Anna Alizarenko

title: Renovating an Old Spanish Finca: What You Need to Know
content: There is nothing more romantic than restoring a historic finca, but it comes with challenges. We discuss permits, traditional materials, and how to preserve the character of the building while adding modern comforts.
author: Roberto Diaz

title: Navigating the Golden Visa Process in Spain
content: The Golden Visa remains a popular route for non-EU citizens to gain residency through property investment. We explain the requirements, benefits, and the step-by-step application process for 2024.
author: Anna Alizarenko

title: Costa Blanca vs. Costa del Sol: Which is Right for You?
content: Both coasts are beautiful, but they offer very different experiences. We compare the lifestyle, climate, property prices, and landscape of these two popular regions to help you decide where to buy.
author: Anna Alizarenko
